title: Instruments for an exploratory study on the social representations of ozone layer recovery and climate change
author: Conde, Júlio J.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This entry compiles the instruments used to analyze the impact of positive news about the recovery of the ozone layer on the social representations of climate change of high school students, which were designed to be applied after the individual reading of a dissemination article with information on the progress of the Montreal Protocol after the Kigali Amendment. The attached instruments, along with their specific objectives, are described below: 
 
 Instrument 1 (Questionnaire): Quantitative analysis of knowledge and opinions about climate change and the ozone layer. 
 Instrument 2 (Drawing and free text): Qualitative analysis of the interpretation of the article's content based on prior representations.
